properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There have been disappoiintments Troubles left and right But in the middle of it all Father you picked me up

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You gave me your light and from then I realized That my broken down life Can turn out new

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the midst broken down life I give myself to you Take every part of me And let Your glory shine through Erase my past and let me face What my future will be Father I know You can do Something to this broken down life.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Father break down All the pieces of my past In You alone, Almighty Father, I trust

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: This broken down life is all that I have You changed me by, Your tender love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In the midst broken down life I give myself to you Take every part of me And let Your glory shine through Erase my past and let me face What my future will be Father I know You can do Soemething to this broken down life.
